title: Kuma’s Life as a Buccaneer
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Dragon, Bonney, Saturn, Unknown person #5, King Bekori as Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.
scene: Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: PANT!! PANT!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By THE WAY, WHO'S THE BABE YOU'VE GOT RUNNING LAPS?

dialogue.speaker: Dragon
dialogue.text: She looks just like Ginny...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why're you all lookin' at me like that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Gotta up my stamina!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wanna be able to sail to the horizon with Daddy by the time I turn 10....!!

dialogue.speaker: Dragon
dialogue.text: Ginny?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's why I'm trying to build my stamina...

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: DADDY?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Who-?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: AYA!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: "You're Bonney?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait, did you eat a devil fruit?! When?!

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: KUMACRI, pull your- self to- gether!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: COULD THIS BE THE AGEAGE FRUT? WHERE DID SHE FIND IT...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I dunno, try chanting some- thing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Granny Time! Granny time!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hang on, Bonney, your body can't take this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: KING KUMA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Bulldog-San requires an audience!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WOOAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You actually did it! AMAZING!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Look at all those wrinkles!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Dang... I still can't make myself old...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Who are you, old-timer?!

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: You must be Princess Bonney...

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: I'm bulldog, your father's advisor.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I've come with dire news.

dialogue.speaker: King Bekori
dialogue.text: the previous, previous king of sorbet BULLDOG

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I see you've already met my mother,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The old queen downager, Conney.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: King Becori's plotting Another Comeback?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What gives?! This article's a total swear job!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This stinks of Becori's propaganda...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It says here you burned villages and took the throne by force!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How dare he?! He's probably laughing about this at some resort overseas!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This proves Becori's still got the backing of the world government.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure he'll make another bid for the throne...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've had reports suggesting his battle ships are already on standby.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I never want to see Becori's face again!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He'll kill us for sure if he returns!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I feel the same. I won't let him take one step on sorbet soil.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If he attacks again, I'll do all I can!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: only... I'm sure they'll have me hunted down as a criminal now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't be able to stay in the country.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: With that in mind, bulldog- San...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can I ask you to reclaim your title as King so things can carry on as they are?

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney’s Tragedy through 47 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
